chapter_title.en: One hearing some of his men verbally abusing the Syrians during the Battle of Siffin

text: ومن كلام له (عليه السلام) وقد سمع قوما من أصحابه يسبون أهل الشام أيام حربهم بصفين

en.sayed-ali-raza: During the battle of Ṣiffīn Amīr al-mu’minīn heard some of his men abusing the Syrians, then he said:
